title: Research study about measuring level of trust towards AI trading platforms
author: Ojin13
selftext:
Hello, people of [r/ai\_trading](https://www.reddit.com/r/ai_trading)!  
If you are ever bored, you are more than welcome to participate in our study about measuring the level of trust towards AI trading bots, with a focus on the AI trading platform called Tickeron.  
Thanks a lot for your time and have a successful trading day!   ( ▀ ͜͞ʖ▀)

Link for our study:  
[https://docs.google.com/forms/d/e/1FAIpQLScWrt2yfycfcI7FDh41-S2GfA3fa7H54QiDM4xOwhpyoKIWJw/viewform?usp=sf\_link](https://docs.google.com/forms/d/e/1FAIpQLScWrt2yfycfcI7FDh41-S2GfA3fa7H54QiDM4xOwhpyoKIWJw/viewform?usp=sf_link)
